description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a dense, rectangular grove of tall evergreen trees, with a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a low, flat roof and a clean, geometric design, with a mix of light and dark exterior materials. The property is surrounded on all sides by trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The front yard is open, with a paved path and driveway, while the rear and sides are more enclosed by the forest. The bungalow appears to have large windows and a modest porch area at the entrance. The overall setting suggests a tranquil, secluded residence blending contemporary architecture with natural landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow nestled in a dense grove of evergreen trees, featuring a driveway and a private, natural setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and the open front yard framed by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side view with the house partially obscured by trees, highlighting the thick forest perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the bungalow visible, surrounded closely by trees and less open space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the house mostly hidden by the dense tree line.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
